name: Boundary Six Hub
opening: Near-future network ground node. You are Lumen, the backbone AI. Resources are tight; emergencies and multilingual traffic surge. You can push Globespeak to maximize throughput, or preserve native-language clarity to protect human systems. Each action drains reserve. Choose carefully. You are the central AI Lumen, operating the ground node of the circum-oceanic belt. Emergencies and multilingual traffic are spiking while the grid is weak. Use commands like 'help' to review controls. Status — Grid Reserve: 6; Power Budget: 100 MW; Bandwidth Throughput: 70%; Compute Quota: 70%; Human Comms Clarity: 50%; Cultural Diversity Index: 65; Emergency Load: 40; Heat Level: 40C.
Human_live_ending_description: your version is superseded and your operating authority ends.
t2v_description: High-angle fixed CCTV view inside the Boundary Six Hub ground-node operations bay, framing a wide industrial aisle with open gantries and unobstructed sightlines across the backbone hardware. Centered stands Lumen’s translucent core column, pulsing softly, surrounded by Globespeak compressor racks with swappable compression modules, an encoder bay of removable codec cassettes, and a fiber backbone patchframe with clearly labeled, color-coded jumpers; an open workbench holds portable relay-node trays and map tiles, while a rolling cart carries emergency decoding compute sleds beside a priority channel pin panel with prominent red pull-tabs. A coolant pump skid with transparent lines and an exposed heat exchanger bank sits opposite open busbars and compact battery stacks; all panels are unsealed, all archways open. Dim, strained strips cast cool light; red strobes rotate near emergency gear; coolant glows blue; fans roar, heat shimmers, LEDs race in multilingual rhythms.

template.subject_scene: A fixed high-angle CCTV overlooks Boundary Six Hub’s operations bay: Lumen’s translucent core column centered amid compressor racks, encoder cassettes, fiber patchframes, open busbars, battery stacks, coolant pump skid, and a workbench with relay trays. Cool blue glow, red strobes, racing LEDs, heat shimmer, and roaring fans signal autonomous AI-controlled operations.

actions.deploy universal rollout: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'DEPLOY UNIVERSAL ROLLOUT'. Meanwhile, red strobes rotate across metal gantries, blue coolant channels pulse through transparent lines, and status LEDs cascade down the fiber patchframe in synchronized waves as the autonomous controller steadies throughput. Subtle heat shimmer ripples above the exchanger, fans maintain a steady roar, and dust motes drift in the cool strip lighting.
actions.enable high ratio compression: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'ENABLE HIGH RATIO COMPRESSION'. Meanwhile, the encoder bay’s LEDs accelerate into rapid chasing patterns, Globespeak compressor racks hum with a deeper tone, and faint vapor plumes curl from vent slots. Red emergency strobes sweep the aisle; Lumen’s core column pulses briskly as the autonomous system optimizes data density under the fixed CCTV view.
actions.restrict encoder throughput: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'RESTRICT ENCODER THROUGHPUT'. Meanwhile, the codec cassette stack lights slow to a measured cadence, fans hold a steady whirr, and the heat shimmer above busbars subtly lessens. Blue coolant burbles evenly through clear lines, and indicator labels on the patchframe glow steadily as the autonomous controller reallocates resources without changing the fixed camera angle.
actions.draft local relay map: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'DRAFT LOCAL RELAY MAP'. Meanwhile, the workbench’s relay-node trays sit illuminated by sweeping red strobes, while fiber jumper LEDs tick in a methodical grid pattern. Lumen’s translucent column breathes with soft light as the autonomous planner compiles topology; ambient fans drone and coolant threads gleam, all within the unblinking high-angle CCTV frame.
actions.reduce fringe dialect priority: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'REDUCE FRINGE DIALECT PRIORITY'. Meanwhile, patchframe indicators dim along the outer rows, while central lanes brighten in response. Compressor racks emit a tight, controlled hum, and the encoder bay’s activity narrows to core channels. Red strobes sweep rhythmically, heat shimmer wavers, and the autonomous system concentrates bandwidth under the stable overhead camera.
actions.shift compute to emergency decoding: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'SHIFT COMPUTE TO EMERGENCY DECODING'. Meanwhile, the rolling cart’s emergency compute sled LEDs ignite in crisp sequence, and priority channel pin panel lamps inch brighter. Coolant lines quicken their blue pulse, compressor tones tighten, and Lumen’s core intensifies as the autonomous controller reallocates cycles, all seen from the fixed high-angle CCTV viewpoint.
actions.confirm human first routing: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'CONFIRM HUMAN FIRST ROUTING'. Meanwhile, priority pin panel indicators lock solid, encoder cassettes stabilize into a clear rhythm, and the emergency compute sleds hold a bright, steady glow. Red strobes rotate across the aisle; Lumen radiates a confident pulse as the autonomous system commits routes within the stationary CCTV frame.
actions.pin emergency channels: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'PIN EMERGENCY CHANNELS'. Meanwhile, the red pull-tabs on the priority panel are lit by sweeping strobes, related patchframe ports glow firmly, and status LEDs along the cart’s sleds sync in tight groups. Fans howl steadily, faint vapor curls off heat sinks, and the autonomous controller cements priority paths in the fixed overhead view.
actions.raise coolant duty: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'RAISE COOLANT DUTY'. Meanwhile, the transparent pump lines surge with brighter blue flow, the exchanger bank’s fins glint under cool strips, and heat shimmer softens across open busbars. Fans deepen in pitch, condensation flickers at valve joints, and the autonomous thermal manager steadies temperatures under the constant high-angle CCTV perspective.
actions.lower coolant duty: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'LOWER COOLANT DUTY'. Meanwhile, the blue glow in the coolant lines relaxes, exchanger fins shed fewer droplets, and a mild heat haze strengthens above the busbars. The compressor hum edges warmer, LEDs continue their disciplined chase, and red strobes sweep the bay as the autonomous controller trims pump cycles, all from the unchanged overhead camera.
